meaning: n.阿蒙神(古代埃及的太阳神)
examples: So Joab returned from the children of Ammon, and came to Jerusalem.
Thus the children of Ammon were subdued before the children of Israel.
"He's a good man, " Ammon said, adding that Romney is competent, if not passionate.
Mr. Ammon asked Mr. Tsarnaev to keep an open mind and said Mr. Tsarnaev didn't seem ignorant.
